modals.teamRatioHint: 按当前比赛总队伍数估算，约为 {{total}} 个队伍中的 {{count}} 个。实际抽样由后端执行。
modals.durationHint: 本次批量启动的每个靶机都会使用相同的生存时长，预览为 {{value}}。
modals.startWarning: 警告：一次性启动过多容器可能导致不可预知的问题，甚至影响服务可用性、集群稳定性或造成宕机。请谨慎确认本次启动规模。

podsNotice.flagPrefix: flag `环境变量` / `文件挂载` 必须以 `FLAG` 为前缀; 变量名可重复，不作为注入时的标识符使用
podsNotice.flagVolume: flag `文件挂载` 通过 volumes.FLAG_x.labels.value 字段指定值
podsNotice.services: services参数只接受: image, ports, environment, volumes, working_dir, command, cpus, mem_limit
podsNotice.networks: 可通过networks配置多个网段, 每个容器可占据多个网段
podsNotice.networksWithIp: 当设置networks时, 每个容器必须指定所使用的network; 不指定时具体IP时, 随机从定义的网段中选取
podsNotice.networksShared: 当不设置networks时, 容器之间共用同一个随机IP地址, 容器间通信请使用本地地址: 127.0.0.1
podsNotice.portUnique: 共用IP地址时, 请注意端口唯一性
podsNotice.exampleIndent: 下述示例中包含了所有可接受字段, 未在其中的字段将被忽略; 务必使用2个空格进行缩进

yamlNotice.flagPrefix: flag `环境变量` / `文件挂载` 必须以 `FLAG` 为前缀; 变量名可重复，不作为注入时的标识符使用
yamlNotice.flagVolume: flag `文件挂载` 通过 labels value 字段指定值
yamlNotice.dockerParams: Docker参数只接受: image, ports, environment, volumes, working_dir, command
yamlNotice.containerUnique: 同一道题目中, 所有的容器名必须唯一, 作为唯一 DNS Hostname
yamlNotice.containerNetwork: 容器间通过 Hostname 或 本地地址 通信

hero.subtitle: Join the elite community of hackers, compete in real-world challenges, and master the art of cybersecurity through hands-on experience.

challengeTypes.subtitle: From web exploitation to binary analysis, our challenges cover every major domain of cybersecurity

web.name: Web Security
web.description: Exploit web vulnerabilities, master XSS, SQLi, and more

crypto.name: Cryptography
crypto.description: Break ciphers, crack codes, and solve cryptographic puzzles

forensics.name: Forensics
forensics.description: Analyze digital evidence and recover hidden data

binary.name: Binary Exploitation
binary.description: Exploit memory vulnerabilities including buffer overflows and heap exploits

reverse.name: Reverse Engineering
reverse.description: Disassemble binaries and firmware to uncover hidden logic and secrets

blockchain.name: Blockchain
blockchain.description: Audit smart contracts and find vulnerabilities in blockchain protocols
